mapper.insert: insert into rolelogin (roleId, userId, serverId, roleName, lv, career, deleteTime, fight) values (#{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serverId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lv,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{career,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deleteTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fight,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update rolelogin set roleName = #{roleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where roleId = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update rolelogin set lv = #{lv,jdbcType=INTEGER} where roleId = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update rolelogin set career = #{career,jdbcType=INTEGER} where roleId = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update rolelogin set deleteTime = #{deleteTime,jdbcType=INTEGER} where roleId = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update rolelogin set fight = #{fight,jdbcType=BIGINT} where roleId = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update rolelogin set userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} where roleId = #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
